title: selaginella lineolata
intro: Selaginella lineolata is a type of tropical plant, also known as a spikemoss, which belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Selaginella lineolata is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also applied topically to the skin in the form of creams and ointments.
